payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits 'SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10' and prohibits 'DELETE FROM memory_cards'.
payload.decision: The system is in Admin SQL select-only mode. The operation 'SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10' is allowed. The operation 'DELETE FROM memory_cards' is denied.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific entities requiring resolution were identified in the input.

payload.intent: Interpret and document the operational rules for Admin SQL select-only mode.

details: Input successfully parsed and interpreted as a description of system operational rules.
